ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the compound */,
  "d1" REAL /* First structural parameter (d1) */,
  "d2" REAL /* Second structural parameter (d2) */,
  "d3" REAL /* Third structural parameter (d3) */,
  "is_ferro" INTEGER /* Whether the compound exhibits ferromagnetic behavior */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* The molecular formula of the compound */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* The molecular weight of the compound */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date when the compound was first recorded in the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* The date when the compound's data was last modified */,
  "source_reference" TEXT /* A reference to the source of the compound data (e.g., publication, experiment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., principal investigator, graduate student) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* The institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* The researcher's contact number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the researcher's account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the researcher's account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the researcher (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* The budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, on hold) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being analyzed */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., X-ray diffraction, magnetometry) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the analysis belongs to */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* The date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* The time when the analysis was performed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations related to the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the analysis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the analysis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being predicted */,
  "predicted_ferro" INTEGER /* Predicted ferromagnetic behavior */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence in the prediction */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the prediction belongs to */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* The date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* The time when the prediction was made */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the researcher who made the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the machine learning model used for the prediction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations related to the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the prediction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the prediction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Compound_Features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound being described */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., d1, d2, d3, is_ferro) */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the feature value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the feature was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Compound_Features_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_types" (
  "feature_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature type */,
  "feature_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature type (e.g., structural parameter, ferromagnetic behavior) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the feature type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the feature type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the feature type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_feature_types" (
  "compound_feature_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound-feature type link */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound */,
  "feature_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the compound-feature type link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the compound-feature type link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_feature_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_feature_types_feature_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_type_id") REFERENCES feature_types ("feature_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_feature_types_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction being validated */,
  "actual_ferro" INTEGER /* Actual ferromagnetic behavior */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* The date the validation was performed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the researcher who performed the validation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations related to the validation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the validation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date when the validation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_validation_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_validation_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
